abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 Health.

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Executioner Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, the target may either discard a card or drain a (c). If it does neither, it is killed.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: You're Comin' With Me
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3", then place this model into base contact with it.

triggers.name: Diseased Limb
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target. Enemy models within (aura)1" of the made marker gain an Injured token.

actions.name: Trail of Gore
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Remove target Remains or enemy Scheme marker.
actions.effects: This model may declare a non-Charge general action or (melee) action.

triggers.name: Justice Ain't Pretty
triggers.text: When resolving, the generated action receives a (-) and a suit of this model's choice.
